'''9T-LOM''' was a [[LOM-series protocol droid/Legends|LOM-series]] [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] owned by a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] accountant named [[Falloon|Soolehad]]. At the time of the early stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invasion, Soolehad went by the pseudonym ''Falloon'' so as to avoid capture. The Rodian employed a team of mercenaries to [[Invasion of Sriluur|get him off]] planet [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]], after 9T-LOM was targeted for destruction by a group of Yuuzhan Vong. Soolehad later turned over the information in the LOM unit over to a group of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] leaders for a good profit on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. This was in effort to safeguard over a century's worth of Black Sun financial records stored in the memory banks of the droid.
